Faculty of Pharmacy

About the Faculty

MENU

Our Mission

To educate globally competent, entrepreneurial pharmacists who will lead efforts to protect and enhance public health."

Our Vision

To be a premier faculty that produces pharmacists who are critical thinkers, effective problem-solvers, and lifelong learners, enabling them to lead the profession globally and generate advance scientific knowledge for the improvement of public health.
